category_sources: Official GnuTLS manual describes it as a library API for secure communication protocols including TLS and DTLS.
source_facts.description says it is the GNU Transport Layer Security TLS library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and manual use the display name GnuTLS.
docs_sources: Official GnuTLS manual and API reference are hosted on gnutls.org.
repo_sources: Official GitLab project page identifies the GnuTLS repository and links to www.gnutls.org.
tags_sources: Official manual describes SSL, TLS, DTLS, authentication, and public key infrastructure support.
